items.title: Navee’s Find My-equipped G5 and G5 Max e-scooters with up to a 44-mile range get first savings starting from $500
items.summary:
Through its official Amazon storefront, Navee is offering the very first price cuts on its G5 Electric Scooter to $499.99 shipped, after clipping the on-page $100 off coupon (with no price match directly from the brand’s website), as well as its G5 Max Electric Scooter to $699.99 shipped, after clipping its on-page coupon (which is also seeing no matching deal direct from the brand). Sadly, the middle sibling G5 Pro e-scooter is keeping to its $700 full price, while we’re getting the first cash savings on the two others that would normally fetch $600 and $800, respectively. These models releases back in November 2025, but haven’t once been included in any sales in the time since, with the deals here giving you $100 markdowns off their going rates, setting the bar for future discounts down the road.

items.title: These Jackery Explorer 5000 Plus and HomePower 3600 Plus power station flash offers hit best 2026 pricing from $2,799
items.summary:
Jackery currently has a Tax Season Sale running through to next week with up to 54% discounts on power stations, including a 72-hour flash sale period on the brand’s larger and newer backup solutions. Things are starting with Jackery’s Explorer 5000 Plus Portable Power Station at $2,799 shipped, which drops from $2,999 to this price in your cart, and is currently out of stock at Amazon. This flash period is bringing the costs down from the full $4,299 rate, which is the best deal we’ve seen yet in 2026 and the lowest price we have tracked directly from the brand’s website or at Amazon. While there was a short-term exclusive deal to $2,399 that we secured from Wellbots back in December, this flash sale is giving you a window to score it at the next-best price, complete with $1,500 savings. Head below to learn more about this model and browse the other flash offers while they last. You can also shop the full Tax Season Sale on the main landing page here.
